info.title: Sociva Platform API
info.description: Complete API documentation for the Sociva community marketplace platform. Covers authentication, user management, commerce, society governance, delivery, gate security, notifications, and admin operations.

get.summary: Get cart items for current user

post.description: Creates a Razorpay order for online payment. Rate limited to 10/min per user.
Handles payment.captured, payment.failed, and refund.created events. Requires x-razorpay-signature header.
Generates a 60-second encrypted QR token for gate entry. Resident must be verified.
Guards/admins validate QR tokens. Supports basic and confirmation security modes. Detects replay attacks.
Updates delivery status. 'picked_up' generates OTP and creates visitor entry for gate. 'at_gate' notifies buyer.
Receives delivery status updates from third-party logistics. Requires x-webhook-signature if secret is configured.
Validates an existing society by ID, or creates a new society with name+slug. Rate limited.
Permanently deletes the authenticated user's account and all associated data. Rate limited to 3/hour.
Checks DB connectivity, trigger errors, orphaned societies, and table row counts.

post.summary: Run AI auto-review on pending sellers/products
post.description: Applies deterministic rules first, then AI (Gemini) for ambiguous cases. Batch processes up to 10 sellers + 20 products.
Generates a 2-3 sentence summary of a bulletin post's comment thread. Requires ≥5 comments.
Creates orders for active subscriptions due today. Handles daily/weekly/monthly frequencies.
Settles eligible seller payments after delivery/payment confirmation and cooldown. Pass force=true to override auto-settle toggle.
Sends push notification via Firebase Cloud Messaging to all device tokens for a user.

post.summary: Notify society members of new help request

post.description: Generates comprehensive monthly report cards for all active societies. Includes financial, governance, transparency, and community metrics.
Sends push notification summary of last 24h activity to all society members.
Creates/upserts test users (admin, seller, buyer, guard) with known credentials and two test societies.
Batch inserts test results into the test_results table (max 500 per batch).
